title: Transform Recruitment: Automate Resume Extraction to Monday with OpenAI

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you a recruitment agency struggling to keep up with the constant flow of CVs and resume submissions? Say goodbye to manual data entry and hello to automation!

We’ve created a powerful automation that revolutionizes how you manage and process resumes. Using the seamless integration of Monday, Make, and OpenAI, this solution automatically extracts key resume details and updates your Monday board.

Here’s how it works:

  1. Candidate Submission: Candidates fill out a simple form (created using Monday.com forms in our example) where they input their name, email, and attach their resume and profile picture.

  2. Automation in Action: Once the form is submitted, our automation kicks in. The AI scans the resume, extracting essential details like education, certifications, and work experience.

  3. Data Integration: The extracted data is then neatly organized into sub-items in your Monday. board, representing the candidate’s qualifications.

  4. Additional Features: For added efficiency, we’ve also integrated Slack notifications to alert your HR team whenever a new candidate submits their resume.

This automation saves hours of manual work, reduces errors, and ensures that all relevant data is captured and organized efficiently. Perfect for recruitment agencies looking to optimize their workflow.

You can start here:

  1. Sign Up for Make with Free Pro Plan: https://www.make.com/en/register?pc=msquare
  2. Follow the link here and download Free blueprint.
